title: Migrate checklist template list-page Angular/C# changes from ps-66855 into ps-66540
body:
Brings the checklist template admin list page to feature parity with ps-66855, implementing the Angular service, missing UI components, C# nomenclature page, and editor fixes that were not included in the initial cherry-pick.

## Angular — new/missing files

- **`ChecklistTemplatesService.ts`** — new `@Injectable()` list-page service extending `BaseService`; signal-based `nomenclature()`, `templates$` observable (BehaviorSubject + shareReplay), `refreshData()` via parallel `GetTemplatesByState(true/false)` calls, `deleteTemplates()` via `CoreSystem.DeleteRecords`
- **`checklist-templates-toolbar/`** — new toolbar component (`ts`/`html`/`css`) with `viewingTitle` input
- **`checklist-templates.component.css`** — flex layout for container, grid, and empty-state
- **`checklist-template-actions-column/`** — missing `html` and `css` files for the actions cell component

## API layer

- **`ChecklistTemplateSystem.ts`** — adds `GetTemplatesByState(isPublished: boolean)` wrapping the existing `ChecklistSystem/getTemplatesByState` controller endpoint

## C# backend

- **`ChecklistTemplatesPage.cs`** (new) — `PageConfiguration` subclass for the checklist templates list page; `GetComponentSettingsAsync` returns `RecordsSettings`; `AddPageNomenclatureEntries` populates `NoRecords`, `EditRecord`, `EditInNewTab`, `DeleteRecord`, `GroupByHeader`, `ViewingLabel` via `entries.AddEntry()` (category-keyed format required by `Common.getNomenclature`)
- **`PageConfigurationFactory.cs`** — replaces `AddAdminProjectListPage(Types.ChecklistTemplates, ...)` with `AddPage(new ChecklistTemplatesPage())`
- **`DEFsNomenclature.cs`** — adds `AddNonFieldLabel(SUBAREA, "ListValues", "List Values")` under `AddChecklistTemplate()`

## Editor nomenclature fixes (Phase 3 copilot fixes)

- **`ChecklistTemplatePageService.ts`** — adds `"ListValues"` to the `NonFieldLabel` keys loaded in `loadNomenclature`
- **`checklist-template-items-tab.component.ts`** — replaces hardcoded `"List Values"` string with `this._pageService.getNomenclature("ListValues")`

## Build

- **`webpack.config.js`** — corrects the `checklisttemplates` bundle entry path from `WebAdmin/Checklists/Templates/` to `WebAdmin/ChecklistTemplates/`

> **Note:** `ChecklistsSettings.aspx` was deliberately **not** deleted — it is the WebForms host container that loads the `checklisttemplates` Angular bundle and also owns the General/UDF/Nomenclature tabs for the Checklists settings section.
author: Copilot
